# Herd

> Herd is an operator-controlled meta-harness for agent fleets. It coordinates
> commanders, workers, agent harnesses such as Codex and Claude Code, channels,
> workspace files, approvals, telemetry, onboarding, and persistent memory.

Use this file as the concise agent-readable map. Prefer setup and operation
pages first.

## Setup

- [Docs home](index.md)
- [Quickstart](getting-started/quickstart.md)
- [Troubleshooting](troubleshoot.md)
- [Provider auth](operate/provider-auth.md)
- [Machines and workers](operate/machines.md)

## Concepts

- [Commanders](concepts/commanders.md)
- [Workers](concepts/workers.md)
- [Command Room](concepts/command-room.md)
- [Approvals](concepts/approvals.md)

## Operations

- [Workspace](operate/workspace.md)

- [Machines and workers](operate/machines.md)
